rulings.Case Title: INFORMATION DELIVERY SERVICES INC VS. ATM EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 4, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANTS ATM EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC. AND CRAIG WICHNER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is overruled. Plaintiffs' evidentiary objections to declaration of Wichner and Ex. "A" is sustained. The court denies defendants request for the court to take judicial notice of the same. Defendant has 10 days fromentry of the order to file its answer. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: HARLEIGH REILLY VS. JP MORGAN CHASE & CO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 4, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANT NRT REO EXPERTS, LLC.S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary adjudication and summary judgment denied. Defendant has failed to shift the burden. The litigation privilege does not apply. See Delois v. Barrett Block Partners (2009) 177 Cal. App. 4th. 940. Further, there is a triable issue of fact as to whether the prelitigation communications related to litigation that was contemplated in good faith. See Action Apartment Assoc. v. City of Santa Monica (2007) 41 Cal. 4th. 1232. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: NORBIE GAERLAN VS. RIZALYNN DELGADO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Risalyn Delgado And Patrick Ryan'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, March 4, 2011, line 14. Defendants Risalyn Delgado And Patrick Ryan's Demurrer To Complaint. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff's notice was defective in that it failed to adequately provide date and time to pay rent as required under the notice. =(302/LMG)
